work_unit: fix npm test scope — exclude scripts/test-*.js debug scripts that falsely fail under node --test
situation: npm test (node --test) picked up 4 scripts/test-*.js debug files as test files, causing 4 false failures. Real tests in test/ (28 cases) all pass but were masked. GATES.md incorrectly claimed 0 test coverage.
action: Changed package.json test script from 'node --test' to 'node --test test/**/*.test.js' to scope to real test files only. Updated GATES.md NICE checkbox and risk note to reflect 28-test reality.
outcome_evidence: npm test → 28 passed, 0 failed (before: 28 passed, 4 false failures from scripts/)
next_suggestion: sunset-prediction CRITICAL gates still unchecked — verify npm install + node server.js startup; or move to moni-master pending worktree merge
